text: told my dentist i floss daily. we both know im lying but we maintain the illusion
the printer jammed again and i just stared at it like it betrayed me personally
left on read for 3 days. at this point its a lifestyle
my alarm goes off at 6am and i negotiate with god for 5 more minutes
susan brought potato salad to the potluck again. nobody asked susan
i carried the entire group project and they all got the same grade as me
stood in the elevator with my boss for 47 floors of pure silence
lost my airpod in the couch cushions. its been 2 weeks. i've accepted the loss
that meeting could have been a slack message and we all know it
ate someones clearly labeled lunch from the fridge. no regrets
rescheduled my dentist appt for the 4th time. they stopped calling me back
my group project partner sent me a google doc at 11:58pm. it was blank
the elevator doors opened and my ex was standing there. i took the stairs
printer said pc load letter and i dont even know what that means anymore
found my lost water bottle 3 months later in the break room. it had evolved
replied 'haha' to a paragraph long text. pretty sure thats why im single
told everyone i wake up at 5am for a run. i wake up at 5am to scroll tiktok
brougth store bought cookies to the potluck and put them on a real plate
the dentist said 'you need to come in more often' like im avoiding them on purpose. i am
someone held the elevator but i pretended not to see and let it close
lost my favorite pen and ive been in mourning for a week straight
that meeting had 14 people in it. 2 of them needed to be there
my group did a 'fair split' of the work. i got 80% of it
the printer makes a noise like its in pain and honestly same
i said 'sounds good' to a text i didnt even read
woke up early once and talked about it for 3 weeks
karen from accounting judges my potluck contribution every single time
the elevator stopped on every floor and i aged 10 years
my dentist remembers my name and that makes one of us who cares about my teeth
i printed 200 pages to the wrong printer. its on another floor. its gone now
group project zoom call. 3 people showed up. there are 6 of us
lost my badge and had to do the walk of shame to security
that 'quick sync' lasted 45 minutes and resolved nothing
someone microwaved fish in the break room and i will never forgive them
i smile at people in the elevator bc the alternative is existential dread
scheduled my dentist appointment 6 months out knowing ill cancel it in 5
printer out of cyan. i was printing black and white. make it make sense
he left me on read and then posted a story 4 minutes later. im fine
told my boss i had a dentist appt to leave early. went home and napped
my potluck dish got zero compliments and i will rememebr that forever
the group project presentation is tomorrow and half the slides say [insert here]
lost my umbrella on a sunny day somehow. talent
we had a meeting to plan a meeting. i wish i was joking
the elevator music slaps harder than it should and i feel weird about it
my dentist asked when i last flossed and i said 'before coming here' like we dont both know
printer jammed on page 1 of 47. i just gave up and went home
left on read by my own mother. the apple doesnt fall far
im a morning person in the same way im a millionaire. aspirationally
brought napkins to the potluck and acted like i contributed
my group project partner plagiarized the introduction from wikipedia. badly
the printer is out of paper. ive told 3 people. nobody has fixed it. its been a week
held the elevator for someone and they went to a different elevator. betrayal
lost my glasses while they were on my head. peak performance
someone said 'per my last email' to me and i felt violence
the dentist office called and i let it go to voicemail. twice
ate a granola bar from my desk drawer. expiration date: 2024. still here tho
i type 'haha yeah' when i have nothing to say. which is always
set 7 alarms and still woke up late. the system is broken
nobody ever eats the veggie tray at the potluck but someone always brings one
the elevator was full so i just stood there and waited. like a ghost
my group project has 4 people and 1 shared braincell and its mine
printer said 'feed me letter size' like its making demands now
lost my train of thought mid sentence in a meeting. never found it
replied to the wrong group chat and now i have to fake my own death
the dentist gave me a new toothbrush and i felt genuinely grateful. im not ok
someone booked a 1 hour meeting with no agenda. psychopath behavior
waved back at someone who wasnt waving at me. in the elevator. doors didnt open for 12 floors
i volunteer to 'take notes' in group projects so i dont have to present
left on read since tuesday. considering becoming a hermit
told everyone i meal prep on sundays. i order doordash on sundays
the potluck signup sheet is passive aggressive warfare and i love it
the printer printed my document in yellow on white paper. art i guess
lost my favorite mug at work. whoever has it i will find you
had a cavity for 6 months before going in. dentist said 'interesting choice'
elevator eye contact with a stranger lasted 0.3 seconds and it was too much
my group project partner cited 'vibes' as a source. we got a C
the break room fridge is a lawless wasteland and i thrive in chaos
someone sent me a voice memo and i will never listen to it
i say im an early riser on my dating profile. first lie of many
showed up to the potluck late so all the good stuff was gone. tactical error
the printer queue has 47 jobs from 2023 and nobody will clear them
got in the elevator going the wrong direction. rode it out. said nothing
my dentist appointment is in 20 min and im writing this instead of going
lost my student ID the first week and used my friends for 3 years
that standup meeting is 40 minutes long. thats a sitdown meeting
group project due in 2 hours. we havent started. this is fine
i eat lunch at my desk to avoid potluck small talk. self care
pressed print 5 times bc nothing happened. 5 copies came out on another floor
someone farted in the elevator and we all just pretended it didnt happen
the hygienist said 'your gums are angry' like my gums have emotions
double texted and then threw my phone across the room. healthy coping
my alarm is labeled 'get up you fraud' and it still doesnt work
someone stole my lunch from the fridge. it had my name on it in sharpie
the meeting invite said 'optional' but the look on my bosss face said otherwise
elevator broke and i had to take the stairs. cardio wasnt on my agenda today
i did the entire group project solo and still put everyones name on it. im a saint
havent been to the dentist since before the pandemic. which pandemic? yes
lost my keys inside my own apartment. they were in the door. from outside
sent 'k' to end an argument and it worked but at what cost
the printer is my nemesis and i will outlive it out of spite
